# Resources



### SwiftUI

- [WWDC25 Explore SwiftUI visually](https://exploreswiftui.com)



#### Courses 

- [Apple Developer](https://developer.apple.com/tutorials/develop-in-swift/welcome-to-app-development) build simple views

- [Kodeco](https://www.kodeco.com/ios) a hands on course to build out a game
